title: Salter 1170 BKDR Electronic Kitchen Scale - 5kg Capacity Digital Weighing Scale, Slim Design, Easy Clean Glass Platform, Add & Weigh, Measure Liquids, Easy Read LCD Display, Battery Included, Black
features: GLASS KITCHEN SCALE: The Glass Electronic Kitchen Scale from Salter combines sleek design with smart functionality—perfect for both beginners and pros. It’s your new go-to kitchen companion!
ADD & WEIGH: With the Add & Weigh feature,you can add multiple ingredients straight to the bowl,cutting down on washing up!
AQUATRONIC: No measuring jug needed! The Aquatronic function lets you measure liquids precisely in both metric and imperial units.
LCD DISPLAY: The clear LCD display makes reading measurements a breeze while you cook up your favourite meals and treats.
COMPACT: Its compact design makes storage easy—just pop it in a drawer or on a shelf, ready for your next culinary creation!

specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 x Ultra Slim Scale, 1 x CR2032 Battery
